summary: Adapt Liepin city selection to delayed search suggestions without extending the normal path.
rationale: The live Liepin picker updates its input value before replacing the previous suggestion list. This change accepts only a candidate matching the requested city, performs one bounded one-second re-observation before considering the overseas tab, and keeps an unverified required filter isolated to its logical query. The site-specific behavior is extracted from the oversized adapter into a focused module.
verification: uv run ruff check src/seektalent/providers/liepin tests/test_liepin_opencli_city_filter.py tests/test_liepin_runtime_source_lane.py
